_comment: GWAS Association Test Cases - SNP-trait associations
_note: GWAS associations provide variant-trait associations with genomic positions, genes, EFO traits, and statistical evidence

custom_tests.name: Check SNP has genomic position
custom_tests.description: Verify SNPs have chromosome, position, region, and context

custom_tests.name: Check SNP to study cross-references
custom_tests.description: Verify SNPs link to GWAS studies

custom_tests.name: Check gene associations
custom_tests.description: Verify SNPs have reported genes and mapped genes

custom_tests.name: Check EFO trait cross-references
custom_tests.description: Verify SNPs link to EFO ontology terms for disease traits

custom_tests.name: Check disease trait text search
custom_tests.description: Verify SNPs can be searched by disease/trait name

custom_tests.name: Check statistical evidence
custom_tests.description: Verify p-values and effect sizes are stored
